name: tee-inference-attestation
description: Verifies that an AI inference occurred inside a trusted execution environment and binds the computation to TEE attestation.
long_description: This circuit enables verification of AI inference execution within a Trusted Execution Environment (TEE), such as Intel TDX, AMD SEV-SNP, or AWS Nitro Enclaves. It binds the inference output to hardware attestation quotes, providing cryptographic proof that computation occurred in an isolated, tamper-proof environment. Essential for high-assurance AI applications.

private.name: tee_quote
private.description: Base64-encoded TEE quote from the enclave

private.name: tee_report_data
private.description: Report data included in the TEE quote

public.name: tee_type
public.description: Type of TEE: intel-tdx, amd-sev-snp, aws-nitro

public.name: model_hash
public.description: SHA-256 hash of AI model weights

author: VRL Core Contributors
security_notes: Verifies hardware attestation quotes. Quote verification depends on availability of Intel/AMD/AWS attestation verification services. Suitable for confidential AI inference.
performance_notes: Constraint count: 4. Proof generation time: ~50ms (attestation verification dominates timing). Proof size: ~1.5KB.

changelog.changes: Initial release supporting Intel TDX and AMD SEV-SNP
